request.text: The space whale has a request, Captain. It's lost track of its favorite comet and wonders if we'd help look. This is either a five-minute favor or the beginning of something.

search.text: Scanning for comets... I have two candidates. One is bright and fast. One is slow and a little melted. Which do we report?

right-comet.text: That's the one! The whale is doing joyful barrel rolls across three lanes of space. It says we are, quote, 'pod.' Captain... we're pod.

wrong-comet.text: Not its comet — but the whale appreciated the effort so much it's adopted this one too. Two comets now. We may have created a collector.

sentimental.text: The melted one wasn't its comet either — but the whale says it reminds it of an old friend, and it's going to travel with it a while. Sometimes the wrong answer is the right one.

decline.text: The whale understands. It sang a small song anyway — no hard feelings in a creature that size. The comet will turn up. They usually do.
